description: Baseline: all-leaf flat tree, 21/34 L0 touched, 13 React UI nodes never reached
Branch guidance + /no_think on 4 prompts: 100% util (was 61.7%), 3 layers. Build 555s — granularity ignored, 53 leaves too many
Granularity guidance: cut leaves 53→11, halved evidence_loop. l0_extract still slow (complex extraction prompt). Source file links broken (Rust gap noted)
Rust team fixes: $decomposed_tree alias crash, extraction_schema wiring, pyramid_file_hashes, rate limiter (4req/5s), jitter backoff
Re-baseline with Rust fixes. 100% util but 2 layers (flat). Decompose producing filesystem questions
Conceptual framing fix. 4 layers restored but 6/7 L2 branches "no evidence" — extraction not covering branch topics
extraction_schema covers branches. 47k token length-out on extraction_schema (2x retry). 76 questions, 20% empty
Consolidated extraction_schema + no-doc-questions + corpus-calibration. Haiku assessors: CONDITIONAL PASS / FAIL. 28% empty nodes, apex decent
v2 pipeline (extract-first). Stacked overlay problem — ran on failed tune-7 slug. Apex excellent but flat (no branches). Invalid: dual overlays
v2 pipeline clean slug. 4 layers, 97% util. Empty nodes WORSE (41%) — decompose sees entity mentions in L0 and asks about them. source_extract too detailed (CSS classes, prop values)

Tightened source_extract.md (1-2 topics, role-not-impl). Empty 41%→14%. Both COND PASS (was COND/FAIL). Specificity 5/5. 4 still-absent topics (testing,CI,docs,linting). Depth quality weak — leaves repeat branches.
Entity constraint backfired. Fewer entities → decompose had LESS corpus info → MORE speculative questions. Empty 14%→35%. Apex regressed to file-layout. Reset to exp 9.
Decompose grounding constraint (Step 5 "verify answerable from summaries"). Tree collapsed to 3 layers. Empty nodes worsened to 44%. Speculative questions still generated. Reset to exp 9.

Invalid slug: forgot to sync the reverted decompose.md to Application Support. Backend used the destructive Ground Check from exp 11 combined with exp 12 answer.md. Layers collapsed to 3. Discard without analysis.

Re-applied exp 9 decompose, combined with exp 12 answer synthesis rules. Empty nodes reduced to 11% (1 node), but tree collapsed to 3 layers. Assessors scored FAIL/COND PASS. Depth Quality dropped to 1/5 because the branch layer was destroyed by overly aggressive DISCONNECTing.
Invalid slug: source_extract in backend was still using the discarded Exp 10 entity constraints. Decompose generated 40 questions to compensate, creating 18 empty nodes. Discarded.

Clean run of decoupled triage & synthesis. Restored 4-layer structure! Assessors scored COND PASS / FAIL. Apex score hit 5/5 for Assessor A, but B failed it due to 3 empty branches (50% of L2). Empty nodes found to be a pre_map + Rust loop gap.
